parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) as total_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'new') as new_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'processing') as processing_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'shipped') as shipped_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'delivered') as delivered_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'returned') as returned_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products) as total_products, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM returns) as total_returns, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) FROM orders WHERE status NOT IN ('returned')) as total_revenue
